TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Buyu' nu bilung == u buyu' han nu Sakizaya, u pazik a buting sa ku Pazik a niyazu'. u lala' Bilung a buyu' itiza aca masabuyu' i kilay a mukelalan , pakay i kasumamadan a niyazu' Takubuwan, mimelaw tya buyu' nu pazik, nu amisatalakaw nu timulan i sasa'. mabekaw, mahiza u paynuwaliyan mingaduyay pazik a buting. nu dietuay a niyazu' u kungku' nu babalaki atu i kalipunan misulitay tu nikauzip, buyu' nu pazik u mapatay a tademaw nu Sakizaya, a taluma i kakawsan acaliwayan naca a zazan, u abenengan nu kawkawsan itiza i nu waliyan a bayu', kakatahkalan nu cilal inu waliyan , sisa a misalisin patungus tu kawkawsan sa, nipatududan apakaydaen i buyu nu pazik, milikeluh miawaw tu kawkawsan sa, a pakayda i buyu' nu pazik, nama hida u buyu nu pazik amihicahica ku sakidaya, sapatinaku tu salisinan a lala' caykapawani. matepa' ku malumanaya a duut uzuma sa, Sakizaya atu i amisay a Pangcah malecad sikungku tu Alikakay, naytiza i buyu' nu Pazik micapi' tu ililis nu bayu'. i satipan nu amisan atudi izaw ku tangku sapisupet tu nanum atu nu wiliyan makaamis a songyen , makatepa tu kasumamanan a tuud, pakayda ini sangaan mimelan, micapi' i cacay a malebud a mihcaan maka tukuh tusaay amalebud lima a lasubu a mihcaan, nika cayhenay kudkud ti cay katinengi pina tu a mihcaan i nuwaliyan izaw ku niyazu' nu Sakizaya Pazik, nama kayza nu timulan Cipawkan malimat tayni, unu Sakizaya a kamu, u ngiha sa nu pawkan ku ngiha, nu Pazik ku ngiha, caykaw nu Takubuwan a ngiha' Pazik sa, mikilul tu i timulay a Pangcah malimad, ina a mihcaan u Pangcah tu katuuday.
S.PHON: == buju Ē~ ° nu bir~…ĺuŇč == u buju Ē~ ° ńßan nu sakizaja, u pazik a butiŇč sa ku pazik a nijazu Ē~ °. u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° bir~…ĺuŇč a buju Ē~ ° itiza a ¶a masabuju Ē~ ° i kir~…ĺaj a muk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan , pakaj i kasumamadan a nijazu Ē~ ° takubuwan, mim…ôr~…ĺaw tja buju Ē~ ° nu pazik, nu amisatar~…ĺakaw nu timur~…ĺan i sasa Ē~ °. mab…ôkaw, mańßiza u pajnuwar~…ĺijan miŇčadujaj pazik a butiŇč. nu di…ôtuaj a nijazu Ē~ ° u kuŇčku Ē~ ° nu babar~…ĺaki atu i kar~…ĺipunan misur~…ĺitaj tu nikauzip, buju Ē~ ° nu pazik u mapataj a tad…ômaw nu sakizaja, a tar~…ĺuma i kakawsan a ¶ar~…ĺiwajan na ¶a a zazan, u ab…ôn…ôŇčan nu kawkawsan itiza i nu war~…ĺijan a baju Ē~ °, kakatańßkar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ inu war~…ĺijan , sisa a misar~…ĺisin patuŇčus tu kawkawsan sa, nipatududan apakajda…ôn i buju nu pazik, mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß miawaw tu kawkawsan sa, a pakajda i buju Ē~ ° nu pazik, nama ńßida u buju nu pazik amińßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku sakidaja, sapatinaku tu sar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶ajkapawani. mat…ôpa Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺumanaja a duut uzuma sa, sakizaja atu i amisaj a paŇč ¶ańß mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sikuŇčku tu ar~…ĺikakaj, najtiza i buju Ē~ ° nu pazik mi ¶api Ē~ ° tu ir~…ĺir~…ĺis nu baju Ē~ °. i satipan nu amisan atudi izaw ku taŇčku sapisup…ôt tu nanum atu nu wir~…ĺijan makaamis a soŇčj…ôn , makat…ôpa tu kasumamanan a tuud, pakajda ini saŇčaan mim…ôr~…ĺan, mi ¶api Ē~ ° i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbud a mińß ¶aan maka tukuńß tusaaj amar~…ĺ…ôbud r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, nika ¶ajńß…ônaj kudkud ti ¶aj katin…ôŇči pina tu a mińß ¶aan i nuwar~…ĺijan izaw ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu sakizaja pazik, nama kajza nu timur~…ĺan ¶ipawkan mar~…ĺimat tajni, unu sakizaja a kamu, u Ňčińßa sa nu pawkan ku Ňčińßa, nu pazik ku Ňčińßa, ¶ajkaw nu takubuwan a Ňčińßa Ē~ ° pazik sa, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu i timur~…ĺaj a paŇč ¶ańß mar~…ĺimad, ina a mińß ¶aan u paŇč ¶ańß tu katuudaj.
S.FORM: == Buyu' nu bilung == u buyu' han nu Sakizaya, u pazik a buting sa ku Pazik a niyazu'. u lala' Bilung a buyu' itiza aca masabuyu' i kilay a mukelalan , pakay i kasumamadan a niyazu' Takubuwan, mimelaw tya buyu' nu pazik, nu amisatalakaw nu timulan i sasa'. mabekaw, mahiza u paynuwaliyan mingaduyay pazik a buting. nu dietuay a niyazu' u kungku' nu babalaki atu i kalipunan misulitay tu nikauzip, buyu' nu pazik u mapatay a tademaw nu Sakizaya, a taluma i kakawsan acaliwayan naca a zazan, u abenengan nu kawkawsan itiza i nu waliyan a bayu', kakatahkalan nu cilal inu waliyan , sisa a misalisin patungus tu kawkawsan sa, nipatududan apakaydaen i buyu nu pazik, milikeluh miawaw tu kawkawsan sa, a pakayda i buyu' nu pazik, nama hida u buyu nu pazik amihicahica ku sakidaya, sapatinaku tu salisinan a lala' caykapawani. matepa' ku malumanaya a duut uzuma sa, Sakizaya atu i amisay a Pangcah malecad sikungku tu Alikakay, naytiza i buyu' nu Pazik micapi' tu ililis nu bayu'. i satipan nu amisan atudi izaw ku tangku sapisupet tu nanum atu nu wiliyan makaamis a songyen , makatepa tu kasumamanan a tuud, pakayda ini sangaan mimelan, micapi' i cacay a malebud a mihcaan maka tukuh tusaay amalebud lima a lasubu a mihcaan, nika cayhenay kudkud ti cay katinengi pina tu a mihcaan i nuwaliyan izaw ku niyazu' nu Sakizaya Pazik, nama kayza nu timulan Cipawkan malimat tayni, unu Sakizaya a kamu, u ngiha sa nu pawkan ku ngiha, nu Pazik ku ngiha, caykaw nu Takubuwan a ngiha' Pazik sa, mikilul tu i timulay a Pangcah malimad, ina a mihcaan u Pangcah tu katuuday.
S.PHON: == buju Ē~ ° nu bir~…ĺuŇč == u buju Ē~ ° ńßan nu sakizaja, u pazik a butiŇč sa ku pazik a nijazu Ē~ °. u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° bir~…ĺuŇč a buju Ē~ ° itiza a ¶a masabuju Ē~ ° i kir~…ĺaj a muk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan , pakaj i kasumamadan a nijazu Ē~ ° takubuwan, mim…ôr~…ĺaw tja buju Ē~ ° nu pazik, nu amisatar~…ĺakaw nu timur~…ĺan i sasa Ē~ °. mab…ôkaw, mańßiza u pajnuwar~…ĺijan miŇčadujaj pazik a butiŇč. nu di…ôtuaj a nijazu Ē~ ° u kuŇčku Ē~ ° nu babar~…ĺaki atu i kar~…ĺipunan misur~…ĺitaj tu nikauzip, buju Ē~ ° nu pazik u mapataj a tad…ômaw nu sakizaja, a tar~…ĺuma i kakawsan a ¶ar~…ĺiwajan na ¶a a zazan, u ab…ôn…ôŇčan nu kawkawsan itiza i nu war~…ĺijan a baju Ē~ °, kakatańßkar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ inu war~…ĺijan , sisa a misar~…ĺisin patuŇčus tu kawkawsan sa, nipatududan apakajda…ôn i buju nu pazik, mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß miawaw tu kawkawsan sa, a pakajda i buju Ē~ ° nu pazik, nama ńßida u buju nu pazik amińßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku sakidaja, sapatinaku tu sar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶ajkapawani. mat…ôpa Ē~ ° ku mar~…ĺumanaja a duut uzuma sa, sakizaja atu i amisaj a paŇč ¶ańß mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sikuŇčku tu ar~…ĺikakaj, najtiza i buju Ē~ ° nu pazik mi ¶api Ē~ ° tu ir~…ĺir~…ĺis nu baju Ē~ °. i satipan nu amisan atudi izaw ku taŇčku sapisup…ôt tu nanum atu nu wir~…ĺijan makaamis a soŇčj…ôn , makat…ôpa tu kasumamanan a tuud, pakajda ini saŇčaan mim…ôr~…ĺan, mi ¶api Ē~ ° i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbud a mińß ¶aan maka tukuńß tusaaj amar~…ĺ…ôbud r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan, nika ¶ajńß…ônaj kudkud ti ¶aj katin…ôŇči pina tu a mińß ¶aan i nuwar~…ĺijan izaw ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu sakizaja pazik, nama kajza nu timur~…ĺan ¶ipawkan mar~…ĺimat tajni, unu sakizaja a kamu, u Ňčińßa sa nu pawkan ku Ňčińßa, nu pazik ku Ňčińßa, ¶ajkaw nu takubuwan a Ňčińßa Ē~ ° pazik sa, mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu i timur~…ĺaj a paŇč ¶ańß mar~…ĺimad, ina a mińß ¶aan u paŇč ¶ańß tu katuudaj.
